appraisal_events.evidence: « cette lettre outrageante … avait dû le faire descendre du rang élevé, unique … dans son estime. Il allait lui devenir moins cher »
appraisal_events.explanation: Swann concludes his insulting letter likely lowered his unique standing in Odette’s esteem and will make him less dear to her.

status_effects.explanation: Swann is locally diminished because he believes his letter reduced his rank in Odette’s esteem.
